title: Flower Clusters
description: Flowers cover the ground better, being placed in clusters rather than individually
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f836272aa0c40fc23d14900b64bdcb184fb83f5.png)

<hr width="25%" />

Flowers placed on the ground don’t fill in enough space to look good on their own. This resource pack aims to fix that by making flowers be in clusters rather than individual, filling in the empty spaces between flowers and making the world generally much prettier.

<hr width="25%" />

Because this only changes models and not textures, it should be compatible with any pack that changes the flowers' textures. However, it won't be compatible with packs that change the flowers' models, for example packs that give flowers a 3D model rather than a 2D cross shape.

There's also support for various mods to make the flowers that they add placed as clusters too. Here's the full list of supported mods:
<details>
<summary>~~ Supported Mod List ~~</summary>

Currently supported mods:
- [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) (burning blossom, glowflower, orange cosmos, pink hibiscus, rose, wilted lily)
- [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether) (white flower, purple flower)
- [Wilder Wild](https://modrinth.com/mod/wilder-wild) (carnation, marigold, seeding dandelion, pasqueflower)
- [Trailier Tales](https://modrinth.com/mod/trailier-tales) (cyan rose)
- [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit) (anemone, black iris, blue iris, hibiscus)
- [No Man's Land](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-mans-land) (aconite, starflower, thistle, blue lupine, red lupine, yellow lupine, pink lupine, autumn crocus, wild mint)
- [Verdance](https://modrinth.com/mod/verdance) (violet)
- [Friends & Foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes) (buttercup)
- [Atmospheric](https://modrinth.com/mod/atmospheric) (firethorn, gilia, yucca flower)
- [Environmental](https://modrinth.com/mod/environmental) (violet, bluebell, dianthus, yellow hibiscus, orange hibiscus, red hibiscus, pink hibiscus, magenta hibiscus, purple hibiscus, red lotus flower, white lotus flower, tasselflower)
- [Autumnity](https://modrinth.com/mod/autumnity) (autumn crocus)
- [Buzzier Bees](https://modrinth.com/mod/buzzier-bees) (buttercup, pink clover, white clover)

What flowers should or shouldn't be placed in clusters is determined by how much the default flower model covers the block it's on. That's why some larger flowers aren't placed in clusters, for example hibiscuses in Wilder Wild.

</details>

February 7th 2026 : 100k downloads, that's crazy!
